593f9d83579d.title: Address isolated food quality complaints from guests
593f9d83579d.description: Food Quality draws isolated criticism across reviews (1 negative mentions). Investigate whether this reflects a systemic issue or isolated incidents.
593f9d83579d.expected_upside: Reduce food quality complaints, protect rating
593f9d83579d.management_implication: Guests are telling you what's wrong. Listen.

03b8b2c85a09.title: Lean into food quality — it's what guests are buying
03b8b2c85a09.description: Guests consistently praise food quality (3 positive mentions). This appears to be what the venue actually sells, whether or not it's what you think you sell. Make it the headline of your online presence.
03b8b2c85a09.expected_upside: Sharpen proposition → attract the right guests
03b8b2c85a09.management_implication: Your guests are telling you your proposition. Use it.

30bd92f6dc4d.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
30bd92f6dc4d.description: At 73 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
